falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 70 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 70 indicates extreme overbought conditions, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting a potential reversal or climax.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained break above the key long-term trendline would invalidate the pattern's similarity to a bottom formation, indicating a shift to bullish momentum.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 200% above the 20-day average on two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume spike would indicate a confirmed breakout or breakdown, falsifying the current indecision (HOLD) and signaling a clear trend direction.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
